issues.title: Add enthusiastic greeting mode
issues.body:
## Problem
The demo app only returns a plain greeting. Add an enthusiastic greeting mode so the Delivery Loop can demonstrate a small agent change.

## Acceptance criteria
- `greeting(name, enthusiastic=True)` returns `Hello, <name>!!`
- Existing default behavior remains `Hello, world!`
- Tests cover both default and enthusiastic behavior

## Constraints
Keep the implementation small and avoid new dependencies.

pulls.title: Add enthusiastic greeting mode
pulls.body:
Implements enthusiastic greeting mode for Delivery Loop demo.

Closes #1

Validation:
- python -m pytest -q
